titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn Maysarah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn Maysarah

segments: ه عن معاوية بن ميسرة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عليّ بن الحكم، عن معاوية ابن ميسرة بن شريح القاضي‌.
arabic.text: ه عن معاوية بن ميسرة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عليّ بن الحكم، عن معاوية ابن ميسرة بن شريح القاضي‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Maysarah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam, from Mu'awiyah ibn Maysarah ibn Shurayh Al-Qadi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Maysarah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam, from Mu'awiyah ibn Maysarah ibn Shurayh Al-Qadi.
